jsonplaceholder-users
hn-top

note: COOKIE strategy: browser navigate + evaluate fetch with credentials

name: zhihu-search-cookie
note: COOKIE strategy: search with query param, HTML stripping, type filtering

name: zhihu-question-cookie
note: COOKIE strategy: multi-step — navigate to question page, fetch answers API with include params, strip HTML

name: xhs-feed-cookie
note: COOKIE strategy: navigate explore page, wait for render, DOM extraction with multiple selector fallbacks

name: xhs-search-cookie
note: COOKIE strategy: search with URL params, wait for async render, DOM extraction

name: xhs-note-cookie
note: COOKIE strategy: multi-step — navigate to note page, extract title/author/metrics from DOM with multiple selector fallbacks

name: hn-new
note: PUBLIC strategy: HackerNews new stories using same Firebase API as hn-top/hn-ask

name: jsonplaceholder-todos
note: PUBLIC strategy: JSONPlaceholder todos — same base domain as posts/users, different endpoint

name: hn-show
note: PUBLIC strategy: HackerNews show stories using same Firebase API as hn-top/hn-ask/hn-new

name: jsonplaceholder-comments
note: PUBLIC strategy: JSONPlaceholder comments — same base domain as posts/users/todos, different endpoint
